title: pavia × neglecta
intro: Pavia × neglecta, also known as Pavia, is a plant species in the family Malpighiaceae, native to South America. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pavia include reducing inflammation, relieving muscle spasms, and promoting wound healing. Pavia can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
